title: Divergent Mind
author: Janet Throop
subline: Reclaiming the gifts of sensitivity, ADHD, and autism.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A SPECTRUM of 24 dots in a row across the bottom 1/3, evenly spaced, all the same size. The DOT FAR ON THE RIGHT IS RED — the 'divergent' one. Title sits in the top 2/3. -->
  <g transform="translate(126 1480)" fill="none">
    <!-- A long horizontal axis -->
    <line x1="0" y1="320" x2="1348" y2="320" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <!-- 24 dots, evenly spaced (1348/23 = 58.6px between centers) -->
    <g fill="#cccccc" stroke="none">
      <circle cx="0" cy="320" r="14"/>
      <circle cx="58.6" cy="320" r="14"/>
      <circle cx="117.2" cy="320" r="14"/>
      <circle cx="175.8" cy="320" r="14"/>
      <circle cx="234.4" cy="320" r="14"/>
      <circle cx="293" cy="320" r="14"/>
      <circle cx="351.6" cy="320" r="14"/>
      <circle cx="410.2" cy="320" r="14"/>
      <circle cx="468.8" cy="320" r="14"/>
      <circle cx="527.4" cy="320" r="14"/>
      <circle cx="586" cy="320" r="14"/>
      <circle cx="644.6" cy="320" r="14"/>
      <circle cx="703.2" cy="320" r="14"/>
      <circle cx="761.8" cy="320" r="14"/>
      <circle cx="820.4" cy="320" r="14"/>
      <circle cx="879" cy="320" r="14"/>
      <circle cx="937.6" cy="320" r="14"/>
      <circle cx="996.2" cy="320" r="14"/>
      <circle cx="1054.8" cy="320" r="14"/>
      <circle cx="1113.4" cy="320" r="14"/>
      <circle cx="1172" cy="320" r="14"/>
      <circle cx="1230.6" cy="320" r="14"/>
      <circle cx="1289.2" cy="320" r="14"/>
    </g>
    <!-- The 24th dot (far right) — RED, larger, with a concentric red ring -->
    <circle cx="1348" cy="320" r="22" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <circle cx="1348" cy="320" r="36" fill="none" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.5"/>
    <!-- An arrow pointing to the red dot from the left, dashed -->
    <line x1="0" y1="220" x2="1348" y2="220" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="3 5" opacity="0.4"/>
    <polyline points="1320,210 1348,220 1320,230" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none"/>
    <!-- Endpoint labels -->
    <text x="0" y="380" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.2em">TYPICAL</text>
    <text x="1348" y="380" text-anchor="end" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.2em">DIVERGENT</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: Neurodivergence is a spectrum, not a category. The cover is a row of 24 evenly-spaced dots (all the same size) on a hairline axis labeled 'TYPICAL' to 'DIVERGENT'. The 24th dot (far right) is RED and 1.5x larger, with a concentric ring. A dashed red arrow above the row points at it. The design refuses to segregate the divergent — they're just a different position on the same continuous line. Title sits in the top 2/3, weight 300 whisper, mixed-case. Brand 'NEURO-' in the bottom-right; pill 'DIVERSE' at the bottom.
